articles.headline: Palantir Reports 104% U.S. Revenue Growth, Raises Full-Year Guidance to +71% Y/Y
articles.summary: Palantir delivered a blowout Q1 quarter with U.S. revenue up 104% year-over-year and raised full-year revenue guidance to +71% Y/Y, recalibrating expectations for enterprise AI platform monetization and signaling accelerating adoption of AI-driven analytics across corporate clients.

articles.headline: Edge Computing Emerges as Tech Sector's Growth Engine in 2026; Fiber and Satellite Infrastructure Investment Accelerates
articles.summary: Industry analysis indicates edge computing is moving from experimentation to core growth driver in 2026, with fiber buildouts and satellite network investments (Amazon, others) lowering adoption barriers for real-time AI inference and creating new demand for inference-optimized semiconductors and cloud services.

articles.headline: Asian Tech Companies Rally on Nvidia Partnership Deals
articles.summary: South Korea's LG Electronics, Taiwan's Nanya Technology, and Chinese automotive suppliers have announced collaborations with Nvidia, signaling expanding AI chip ecosystem partnerships across Asia. This trend affects supply chain positioning and component sourcing strategies for businesses dependent on semiconductor availability and pricing.
